extortion.description: Tubular Steel Inc is a company that operates in the Mining & Metals industry. It employs 21-50 people and has $10M-$25M of revenue.Headquarters:285 Raleigh Ave, Scarborough, Ontario, M1K 1A5, Canada: (416) 261-9571: www.tubularsteel.ca: $19 MillionTubular Steel Inc. is a North American leader in precision welded steel tube production. Our culture of continuous improvement helps to maintain our leadership role as one of the most forward-thinking carbon steel tube manufacturers in North America.
